description: Informal note. In Judaeo-Arabic. Giving instructions about transactions, involving a mould of cheese, a half-qadaḥ of rice, a chicken, sesame oil, the hire of a boat, and clothing. On verso there is another note or list in Arabic script. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
